title: “It’s Rare for Me” Art Exhibit at the European Parliament [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: This event video brings together short interviews with representatives from Chiesi, Members of the European Parliament, patient advocates and patient organisations, recorded at the opening ceremony of the “It’s Rare for Me” art exhibition at the European Parliament in Strasbourg.
